faqs.question: What kind of specializations are available in courses offered at St.Mary's Engineering College?
faqs.answer: St.Mary's Engineering College offers Degree and Diploma courses including 10 UG and 13 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. St.Mary's Engineering College has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Power Engineering, Production Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, MBA/PGDM specializations in Digital Marketing, B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Embedded Systems & VLSI.

faqs.question: Which courses are offered by St.Mary's Engineering College?
faqs.answer: St.Mary's Engineering College has courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Tech, After 1th Diploma which are primarily in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies, Animation, IT & Software. St.Mary's Engineering College has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Power Engineering, Production Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, MBA/PGDM specializations in Digital Marketing, B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Embedded Systems & VLSI.

A:    St.Mary's Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidates completed B.E./ B.Tech. in relevant branch from any recognized university are eligible to apply.
Candidate must have also qualified TSPGECET.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed graduation from any recognised universityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognized as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh.

Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandidates must have passed 10th examination conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or from any other recognised board in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained at least 35% marks in the qualifying examination.

Candidate  must have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% Marks in each subject.

Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in March/April-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared are also eligible.

reviews_list.review_title: It is absolutely satisfying because of the environment and good placements in 2025.

review_content.Placements: MNCs hire students in our college with the highest packages and the best software roles. The highest package is 15 LPA and the lowest package is 5 LPA. Many students got selected in the top MNCs like Amazon, Flipkart, Wipro, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for all course students are Wi-Fi, AC labs, classrooms, and a large and pleasant library to explore the book world. We also have quality food in our hostel mess and canteen. Medical facilities are available.

review_content.Placements: Around 60% of students got placed in the campus interviews. The highest package of our college is around 7 LPA-8 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is around 4 LPA-5 LPA. paragraphs: St.Mary's Engineering College admissions are entrance-based. The institute accepts scores in TS EAMCET, TS POLYCET, and TSICET, etc.St.Mary's Engineering Collegeoffers courses at UG level in Engineering, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software and Animation stream. The institute offers B.E. / B.Tech for 4 years in various specialisations. Candidates can fill out the application form online for admission.

The total tuition fees for UG course isINR 2,00,000. Aspirants have to pay the programme fees at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the institute. The total fees may also include other components such as caution deposit, hostel fees, etc.

faqs.question: How is the faculty at SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur)?
faqs.answer: Everything said about the faculty, as it is generally perceived, is true. They are skilled employees from SIET Bijapur, with an emphasis on dynamic teacher-student interaction. As the institution is very keen on building a strong academic foundation, the professors there have a combination of qualifications and extensive experience in all engineering domains. They are approachable and care about the student learning experience. Teaching infrastructures are exquisite, with most of the classrooms being smart ones paired with current-day teaching instruments to bring forth the best to the learner. Most of the faculty members are involved in research works and academic projects, thereby enhancing the whole education experience. Overall, however, quality and effectiveness in teaching greatly depend on each professor and department.

A:    SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur) has placed its selected students in known and reputed companies such as Terminal Contacts, Bharat Industries, Dimple Advisory Pvt Ltd, Flemings Embedded And Software Solution, Group Edge Media Managers Pvt Ltd, Xxxxxxxxxxxxx, Klinikals, Greens Hyper Market Pvt Ltd.
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters from SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur) when it comes to placements?

faqs.answer:
A:    SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognised Institute.M.E./M.TechCandidates must have passed qualifying examination or equivalent examination as prescribed by the Competent Authority and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I candidates) taken together in all the subjects of all the years/ semesters of the Degree Examination from any recognised institute/university.
Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates must have valid GATE score.MCACandidate should have studied Maths at 10+2 stage or at graduation level.UG DiplomaCandidate must have completed 10+2 from any recognised Board/Council.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur) for UG/PG courses?

faqs.answer: A:    SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur) has courses such as B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech, MCA, UG Diploma which are primarily in the stream of Engineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies. SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur) has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Information Technology.
faqs.question: What courses are available at SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur)?

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur) are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur) goes up to 552.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good environment and experienced faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Around 75% of students get placed. The salary package offered is Rs.80,000 to 1 LPA. Spyder, Infosys, Tata, HCL, Wipro, BMW, Tech Mahindra, ACC Cement, Birla, Hyundai, Syska, and HMT offer placements. Around 50% of students are placed at HCL, Spyder, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, and HMT. Executive engineer, assistant executive engineer, assistant engineer, and a junior engineer are the roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi speed is about 105 Gb. Library has books of all courses and extra books for extra and deep knowledge about subject. There are aviated classrooms with ceiling fans and comfortable benches with 3 seaters. All useful and informative instruments are available in labs with high quality and accurate results.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am partially satisfied with this college, as it has supporting faculty and good curriculum track.

review_content.Placements: No such promising placements are done on campus. We have to look for our careers by ourselves. Career guidance is given but that will not help any student. Companies are least bothered about this college. Very less people get internships. Only some companies like Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, and Spider hire our students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The building is not constructed well enough to be considered a good university but there is a basic model of infrastructure that colleges need. When it comes to hostel, the management is least bothered about the hostel and everyone is focused on making a profit out of it. Labs are well-equipped and has updated systems or computers.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Best college in the Bijapur.

For placements and training students they have provided online classes. The college environment is very good.

individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good teaching quality, placements, and infrastructure.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. The laboratory has the latest software and the internet facility is good. Classrooms are well furnished. Hostel accommodation is not good. The canteen is also good and our entire campus has a Wi-Fi facility.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is a good campus with the best and most supporting teachers.

content.Placements: More than 80% of the students get placed through campus interviews, and the rest of them opt for higher education. Top recruiting companies are Cognizant and Tech Fortune, and some of them are working in IBM and Accenture.

Hostels are also good with much taking caring wardens and staff members.

admission_process.title: SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur) Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur) admission 2025 is merit-based. To apply for the programmes offered, students need to clear the preset admission criteria. At SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur), students can pursue wide range of programmes in fields, such as Engineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software.

Some of the popular SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur) programmes are B.E. / B.Tech and UG Diploma, etc at UG level and MBA/PGDM and MCA at PG level. These programmes are offered in full time mode. See below the key highlights for SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur) admissions:

faqs.question: Is admission open in SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur)?
faqs.answer: Yes, admissions are currently open at the SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur) for various undergraduate (B.E.) and postgraduate (M.Tech, MBA) programs. Admissions usually require PUC Examination with compulsory Physics and Mathematics subjects, whereas the eligibility criteria vary slightly for reserved categories.

SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur) Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 17031 in the General AI category.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur). In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 17031 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 32808, while in 2023, it was 41895.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

Students can use computers in the library for their research and study. Classrooms are very good with projectors in each class. Hostels are also good with much taking caring wardens and staff members.

reviews.review_heading: Our college infrastructure is quite good, but some teaching faculty members are not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. Facilities like hostel food and canteen are rated up to 4 out of 10. In the library, there is no Wi-Fi, and they are just providing ethernet connectivity with around 30 PCs for the whole college in which the total number of students in college around 2,000.

reviews.review_heading: The college and our faculty are good.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. Although there are many labs with good equipment, lecturers are not able to teach well. A few of the instruments in FM Lab got damaged, but our staff members don't pay any attention to that issue.

reviews.review_heading: The best teacher and the best ecosystem.
reviews.review_text: The college had a playground, garden, and a hostel within the campus. Different food items were also available in the canteen, and they had a mess inside the canteen. After eating in the mess, I went to my room. The room was very big. There was a 24-hour water supply inside the hostel. Functions were also organized.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and teaching at an affordable fee.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in the hostel. They provide food and medical facilities. The hostel is highly secured.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for middle-class family students.
reviews.review_text: The building of our college is built at a very lovely place, and it is well-connected by road. There are various facilities like labs for every subject and free Wi-Fi facility. There is a clean library. The hostel is the 2nd home for every student, so I like hostel and food made by local aunties. Medical facilities are provided by good doctors at any time. There is a huge field for games like cricket, football, etc.

college_info.college_name: SECAB Institute of Engineering and Technology (SIET Bijapur)

data.description: Everything said about the faculty, as it is generally perceived, is true. They are skilled employees from SIET Bijapur, with an emphasis on dynamic teacher-student interaction. As the institution is very keen on building a strong academic foundation, the professors there have a combination of qualifications and extensive experience in all engineering domains. They are approachable and care about the student learning experience. Teaching infrastructures are exquisite, with most of the classrooms being smart ones paired with current-day teaching instruments to bring forth the best to the learner. Most of the faculty members are involved in research works and academic projects, thereby enhancing the whole education experience. Overall, however, quality and effectiveness in teaching greatly depend on each professor and department.

answer.text: Yes, GIM scholarships are offered to students as financial assistance. The college offers Merit Scholarships to MBA students in the first and the second year. This scholarship is offered based on the student's performance in the university exams. The below-mentioned table reflects on the eligibility criteria of Merit Scholarships, and the scholarship amount offered by the Guruvayurappan Institute of Management:Scholarship Eligibility CriteriaScholarship AmountFive Merit scholarships are offered to the top five students who have cleared the first-year university exams, only if they have cleared all the papers in the very first appearance and have also scored minimum 65% aggregate (second and first semesters taken together)INR 5,000Another five Merit Scholarships are offered to the five toppers of the university exams in the final MBA exams (all four semesters put together) only if they have cleared all the papers in the very first appearance and have a scored minimum of 65% aggregate (all the four semesters taken together)INR 5,000

admission_overview.college_name: Guruvayurappan Institute of Management Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_process.title: Guruvayurappan Institute of Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: GIM Admission 2025 is open for all courses. The institute offers PG and doctoral-level courses in the field of Management. These are MBA, PhD and MPhil. All of these courses are offered in affiliation with Bharathiar University. Those who are interested in getting admission to an MBA must apply online on the official website ofGuruvayurappan Institute of Managementand qualify for the eitherCAT/CMAT/MAT/TANCET/ CET entrance exams, followed by PI round.

Candidates seeking admission at GIM are required to meet the course-specific eligibility criteria and then undergo the selection process determined by the institute. Interested candidates can check out theGIM course eligibility and selection criteriafrom the below table:
Graduate in any discipline from a recognised university
CAT/CMAT/MAT/TANCET/ CET + GD + PI +TANCET Counselling

The GIM Admission process is a multi-step process. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria of their desired course are required to fill out the application form followed by appearing for the selection rounds.

Check below the complete Guruvayurappan Institute of Management admission process:Application:The mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form.Selection rounds:Appear for the college-based selection rounds, which include shortlisting based on scores in the entrance exam, a group discussion, and a personal interview, and then wait for the release of their resultsAdmission confirmation:Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates who perform well in all three rounds are notified about their selection and they need to pay the admission confirmation fee and appear for a document verification process to finalise their admission.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Come to this college and read wholeheartedly, succeed touches your feet.

content.Placements: About 20% of students are placed in campus placement. The highest package is 6 LPA and the lower package is 2.8 LPA. About 75% of students got an internship in the role of a software analyst. Cardekho and Mobility have selected many of the students with the lower package.
content.Infrastructure: Around 24-hour Wi-Fi connection with high Mbps and library is only open during college time, not the whole time. Sports and games are available 24 hours. A gym room is also available during the day and evening in the hostel. Girls are not allowed in the boys' hostel.

individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and having a well maintained labs for all courses.

content.Infrastructure: pretty good classrooms, hostel canteens etc. Quality of the food is not so good but it's good. For third and final year students, there is 2-week training about personality development. All labs are fully Air-conditioned and neat and clean for the students.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at JD Institute of Fashion Technology are MBA and BSc. BSc students are made to practice a lot and build the ability to develop their independent creative vision. Students are greatly encouraged to explore several new ways of working. They are also taught to develop their creative vision and identity. JD Institute of Fashion Technology Bangalore students are introduced to various drawings and digital tools. The college offers an MBA programme that specialises students in Fashion Business and helps them to kick start their careers.
JD Institute of Fashion Technology Bangalore MBA students are placed in top companies in top sectors such as Zara, Pantaloons, Calvin Klein, Blackberry, H&M, Tommy Hilfiger, and others. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at JD Institute of Fashion Technology in the table provided below:

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am extremely disappointed and dissatisfied with this college, or rather I would rate it 0.

review_content.Placements: About 49% of the students got placed. They have not offered any salary packages. None of the top recruiting companies visits the campus for placements. The top roles offered are an intern and a junior designer. Almost all students who got internships have searched the companies on themselves.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have all the facilities just for name-sake. They don't let us use labs they say that they are only for fashion course students but not for interior designing even though we paid for it. So we only have access to classrooms and Wi-Fi. There are no hostel, mess, canteen, sports and games facilities here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of the teaching quality. The college is not worth the money paid.

review_content.Placements: Around 40 students were placed in our course. I haven't completed the course, so no such offers have been made. No such offers have been made as the courses are still going on. Internships are not yet offered as the courses are still going on.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good, but the library doesn't have enough books to get answers. Wi-Fi provided by the college is bad. Though fees include lab fee yet not much opportunity is given to use the lab. There is no canteen available in the college, and I haven't heard about the medical facilities provided.

review_summary.college_name: JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Bangalore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Fashion and Apparel Design - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college has really good infrastructure and facilities for the students.

content.Placements: JD institute of fashion technology has good placements every year. Around 30–35% of the students gets placed in our course. The average package offered in our course was between 3-6 LPA. The top recruiters at the college were fashion technology and services companies. The top roles offered were fashion designer, marketing, animation, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good-quality facilities and infrastructure for our course. At this college, there are Wi-Fi, labs, libraries, canteens, hostels, sports, etc. facilities available on campus. The college canteen offers food at a reasonable price and is good in taste. Multiple sports facilities were available for the students.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Fashion Design - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: A glimpse into academic prowess and vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: In our course almost 100% students got placed in many top recruiting companies like Wendell Rodricks and Masaba Gupta etc. The highest package is 35 Lacs per annum and average package is 12 Lacs per annum and the lowest package is 6.8 Lacs per annum. Top roles offered in our course is Fashion illustrator, pattern makes, Fashion buyer Fashion photographer etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of college is excellent in all aspects like The college has a well-equipped lab that enhance hands on learning. The hostel facilities are commendable providing a secure and comfortable living environment. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is fully hygienic. Trained medical staff ensures promt and efficient healthcare services for students. In our college many sports facility is also available like sports court and big playground.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am extremely disappointed and dissatisfied with this college, or rather I would rate it 0.

content.Placements: About 49% of the students got placed. They have not offered any salary packages. None of the top recruiting companies visits the campus for placements. The top roles offered are an intern and a junior designer. Almost all students who got internships have searched the companies on themselves.
content.Infrastructure: We have all the facilities just for name-sake. They don't let us use labs they say that they are only for fashion course students but not for interior designing even though we paid for it. So we only have access to classrooms and Wi-Fi. There are no hostel, mess, canteen, sports and games facilities here.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied because of the teaching quality. The college is not worth the money paid.

content.Placements: Around 40 students were placed in our course. I haven't completed the course, so no such offers have been made. No such offers have been made as the courses are still going on. Internships are not yet offered as the courses are still going on.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good, but the library doesn't have enough books to get answers. Wi-Fi provided by the college is bad. Though fees include lab fee yet not much opportunity is given to use the lab. There is no canteen available in the college, and I haven't heard about the medical facilities provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Interior Design and Decoration - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college experience in learning was good.

content.Placements: There are no good placements in our college as such. Students had to find their placements and even internship. Almost 30% of students got placed, but faculty members were good. They were very understanding and helpful. The fee structure is a bit high to afford, but fashion in college has good exposure.
content.Infrastructure: The college is located in a commercial area. There is very good access to good restaurants and cafes near the college. Classrooms are good and equipped with LED television in all classrooms. There is a central air-conditioning facility throughout the college. Labs were good. The exam centre at our college was very helpful.

paragraphs: Listed below are the steps to fill out the JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Bangalore application form:

The application forms are made available online. The form inquires about basic details. The institute also charges an application fee.
2. Selection Rounds

reviews.review_heading: The college has really good infrastructure and facilities for the students.
reviews.review_text: The college has good-quality facilities and infrastructure for our course. At this college, there are Wi-Fi, labs, libraries, canteens, hostels, sports, etc. facilities available on campus. The college canteen offers food at a reasonable price and is good in taste. Multiple sports facilities were available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: A glimpse into academic prowess and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of college is excellent in all aspects like The college has a well-equipped lab that enhance hands on learning. The hostel facilities are commendable providing a secure and comfortable living environment. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is fully hygienic. Trained medical staff ensures promt and efficient healthcare services for students. In our college many sports facility is also available like sports court and big playground.

reviews.review_heading: I am extremely disappointed and dissatisfied with this college, or rather I would rate it 0.
reviews.review_text: We have all the facilities just for name-sake. They don't let us use labs they say that they are only for fashion course students but not for interior designing even though we paid for it. So we only have access to classrooms and Wi-Fi. There are no hostel, mess, canteen, sports and games facilities here.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of the teaching quality. The college is not worth the money paid.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good, but the library doesn't have enough books to get answers. Wi-Fi provided by the college is bad. Though fees include lab fee yet not much opportunity is given to use the lab. There is no canteen available in the college, and I haven't heard about the medical facilities provided.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college experience in learning was good.
reviews.review_text: The college is located in a commercial area. There is very good access to good restaurants and cafes near the college. Classrooms are good and equipped with LED television in all classrooms. There is a central air-conditioning facility throughout the college. Labs were good. The exam centre at our college was very helpful.

reviews.review_heading: This institute is good for its placements, experiences, and learning.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, but facilities in the canteen should be improved. Rest all the facilities provided in the college are fine. They use updated machines and equipment. The library and labs are updated with the latest versions. Overall, it has a nice learning environment, and the college is located on Brigade Road.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied as we have the best faculty members and supporting team.
reviews.review_text: The college has a library and classrooms at best. The infrastructure of our college is the best with air conditioners and all other facilities for teachers and students. We have many labs. Sports are also conducted. All the festivals are celebrated with a unique theme. The college provides a Wi-Fi facility.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college, and I would like to recommend it to others.
reviews.review_text: The college has good library facilities, and it's very spacious. Classrooms are excellent. The college also has CAD labs. There are spacious pattern labs and good sewing labs. The college even has good textile labs. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty.
reviews.review_text: In our college, we have been provided with Wi-Fi which has good speed and very important for a designer. The library has all the books which are needful, and all magazines are also there. Classrooms are very neat, and it has smart class access facilities so that the teacher can make us study easily.

reviews.review_heading: A college in which every student will dream about fashion.
reviews.review_text: It has a very well built classroom with facilities that are needed for students. Machines are provided to everyone. Everyone in the class has their dress forms for draping class. I guess it has the best infrastructure until now. It has everything which a student is needed in a fashion classroom.

reviews.review_heading: The college has only a few faculty members due to which students do not receive much attention.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is great, but I do feel that we should have a canteen so that students who spend about 8-9 hours in the college can eat on the campus itself without spending much money. The labs and classrooms are also great. Our chairs squeak a little, and those should be replaced. However, that's just a minor issue.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty members and placements, but the infrastructure can be improved.
reviews.review_text: I like the labs present in this college, but the classrooms are pretty small and congested. Our canteen offers very few food items. There is no place for students to enjoy apart from the terrace of the building. The college doesn't provide any medical facilities. There is only one washroom for both boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is great. Classrooms and other facilities provided by the college are appealing. Quality of the labs and library is really good. The college is well-equipped with all modern facilities. The design and stitching labs are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: We need highly experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi, air-conditioned classrooms, stitching labs and textile labs. We have very spacious classrooms. We don't have a canteen, but we have a stall where biscuits and chips are sold. Quality of labs and classrooms is good. Classrooms and labs are very clean.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is nice but also has a few drawbacks.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not really great, but it's nice. It has a well-equipped centralised air-conditioning system. It's convenient to avail every facility in the college. The college doesn't have a canteen. Although it has two buildings, the campus is very small. The classrooms are also very small.

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management offers courses such as MBA/PGDM. Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,33,000 to 2,44,800.

faqs.answer: A:    Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management offers Degree courses including 6 UG and 1 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Civil Engineering.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management?

review_content.General: Actually, on the portal page, the campus looks cool, but on ground-level, the building is under construction. Wi-Fi facility is available only near director's room. The hostel facility is average. Girls hostel was the worst as it was not fixed, but boys hostel was fixed. Sports and games are available only once in a year to day-scholars and hostellers. If you only want a degree, then you are welcome.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are not much good. Students have to go on their own for their basic facilities. You can't be dependent on the college. It just provides you with the basic facilities required like normal study materials. Moreover, you can get the examination centre at Ambalika Institute or in Azaad, but the placements are not very good.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has good buildings and a well-finished floor. It is a 4-floor building and has big rooms with a lot of space for sitting and studying. The quality of the building is solid. Learning facilities are very good. You can manage your free time according to your study.

review_content.Other: College HMR has built quite a repo in past two years. Teachers and college collectively are putting in great efforts to improve college throughout. description: Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing rank was 615824 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Sc

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 615824 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 730729 in 2023 and 775793 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering demonstrated a declining trend.

Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management.

Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2024 was concluded with the released of the final cutoff list. Among all the B.E. / B.Tech specialisation available, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most competitive, with a lowest last round closing rank of 615824 for the General category students belonging to the AI quota. The lowest the cutoff rank the highest is the competition and vice versa.

Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management UPTAC cutoff 2024 was concluded for B.E. / B.Tech admissions. The institute accepts the JEE Main ranks, followed by UPTAC counselling for admission. During the last-round, the Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management cutoff was 615824 for the General AI quota. Considering the closing rank, the top most competitive course for admission was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering.

review_content.Placements: Around 60-70% of students got placed in our B.Com course. The highest salary package offered was around 5-6 LPA, the lowest salary package offered was 1-2 LPA, and the average salary package offered was 3-4 LPA. Top recruiting companies were various private banks like HDFC, ICICI etc. There was no internship in our course. The top roles offered in our course were accounting and managing a business.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is spread over 4.03 acres in the heart of Chembur. It has 2 buildings, main building, which houses the principal's office and administrative office, auditorium, AV room, central instrumentation facility, Ccmputer labs, arts, science and commerce departments, classrooms, staffroom etc. The annexure building has few classrooms, canteen and gymkhana for indoor games. The sports ground adjacent to the college building is used for outdoor activities. The campus has sufficient leisure space for students.

review_content.Placements: There are no placement opportunities in our college. Our senior students got placed through placement pools conducted by other colleges. content.Placements: About 60% of the total were placed in the companies that visited our campus for campus placement. Mostly the companies came from Chandigarh and Delhi ncr. The highest package was 4 Lacs per annum and the lowest went to 1.2 Lacs, and the average was of 2 Lacs per annum.

A big sport ground where multiple things are organised with games and other functions. Labs are good as there are so many machinery available but yes the guidence is not so good for the students who want to learn more than an average. We have canteen as well as mess both are separated as well as there food quality is also different. But on an average the quality of the food is good. There are AC as well non-AC rooms available. Yes, there are lack of shops inside the campus. For basic needs, we had to travel at least 5-6 km far from our campus.

Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 4 years.

Candidates interested in taking admission at Shree Ram Mulkh Institute of Engineering and Technology can check out the sections below to view the exam, course, and category-wise cutoff details. A few more updates are below:

Shree Ram Mulkh Institute of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 was released via HSTES entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff was 292271 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. During the last round, Shree Ram Mulkh Institute of Engineering and Technology B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 was 292271 for students in the General HS quota. According to this cutoff list, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering proved to be the toughest to get a seat in 2025, while in 2024, the same specialisation had the cutoff rank of 420373, and in 2023, it was 420373. review_summary.college_name: Guru Nanak Institute of Management and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Professional) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great institute to pursue bcom.hons offering a balanced academics and extra curricular activities.

content.Placements: GNIMT Ludhiana provides decent placements. They actively work on actively connecting the institute's students with various industries and companies for internship and job opportunities. I recently got an internship in Skillkart through my college and i got recruited as a talent acquisition specialist . Overall the college provides ample opportunities for students to kickstart their career after graduation.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for the Bcom.hons course at GNIMT Ludhiana is great and well designed to provide a good and comfortable environment for students. All of the classrooms have air conditioners. The campus also has a well maintained library with a vast collection of books, journals and other research materials . However there is no hostel facility.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My college with some memorable moments .

content.Placements: It's not fixed but students above 70 percent can take admission to our college in different courses. The average package was 3 to 5 lacs, depending on your skills. There are so many companies that come to our campus for recruiting. An internship is based on your skills and course knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: There are different facilities at my college for different courses. Like I was a BCA student, there are two labs in which computers are available for students to help or work with a good Wi-Fi network. Classrooms are fully clean and have AC in some rooms. Also with a good lighting system. There is also a library, which has many different books.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Bad college, but nice teacher.

content.Placements: The student needs more than 60% to be admitted to that college. In all courses. The highest packages they offer are 2.7 LPA to 5 LPA. They offer BCA, MCA, M.Com., MBA, and BBA courses at Guru Nanak Institute of Management and Technology.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available at the college. They provide Wi-Fi passwords, so the students suffer on digital to find new innovation. Some rooms are equipped with air conditioning and projectors. Their are no hostel facilities in college. They just have a small park.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Professional) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college has guaranteed placements and it also has worthy services.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of students got placed in our course. The top recruiting companies are Byjus, Infosys, Hero Cycles, Vardhman Decathlon, etc. The top roles offered are manager, sales marketer, accountant, employer, etc. The highest salary package offered was 12 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 2 LPA. The average salary package offered was 7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: This college has sufficient classes with proper furniture boards and smart classes. The library is also provided. It also has training and placement cell. It also has an office for students' inquiries. I am a day scholar so I do not know about hostel facilities. But I have heard that the hostels are average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college is very good with good infrastructure and canteen food.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students got placed in our college. The lowest salary package offered was 2 LPA and the highest salary package was 5 LPA. Coca-Cola, Extra marks, HDFC, Byju's, Infosys, Wipro, and Cognizant were the companies recruiting students. Around 80% of students got internships. Roles were offered in marketing, sales, in finance as HR operation, product management, business analytics, digital marketing, service marketing, sales, and business development.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was very good and clean. The quality of food served was good. Our college atmosphere was good. Warden was not good but the hostel students were full of discipline. There were low-quality rooms. Air-conditioners and water purifiers were not available. The water was not good. The canteen served good quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Great institute to pursue bcom.hons offering a balanced academics and extra curricular activities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the Bcom.hons course at GNIMT Ludhiana is great and well designed to provide a good and comfortable environment for students. All of the classrooms have air conditioners. The campus also has a well maintained library with a vast collection of books, journals and other research materials . However there is no hostel facility.

reviews.review_heading: My college with some memorable moments .
reviews.review_text: There are different facilities at my college for different courses. Like I was a BCA student, there are two labs in which computers are available for students to help or work with a good Wi-Fi network. Classrooms are fully clean and have AC in some rooms. Also with a good lighting system. There is also a library, which has many different books.

reviews.review_heading: Bad college, but nice teacher.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available at the college. They provide Wi-Fi passwords, so the students suffer on digital to find new innovation. Some rooms are equipped with air conditioning and projectors. Their are no hostel facilities in college. They just have a small park.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has guaranteed placements and it also has worthy services.
reviews.review_text: This college has sufficient classes with proper furniture boards and smart classes. The library is also provided. It also has training and placement cell. It also has an office for students' inquiries. I am a day scholar so I do not know about hostel facilities. But I have heard that the hostels are average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good with good infrastructure and canteen food.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was very good and clean. The quality of food served was good. Our college atmosphere was good. Warden was not good but the hostel students were full of discipline. There were low-quality rooms. Air-conditioners and water purifiers were not available. The water was not good. The canteen served good quality food.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college but the shortage of space is the basic problem .
reviews.review_text:
There are computer labs, library, auditorium, meeting room, etc. in the college.
The food provided in the canteen is of poor quality. The food is full of oil, which is not good for students' health also. They provide sports equipment also.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel but the institute have a good infrastructure with proper computer labs, sports like table tennis and air conditioned classrooms. The canteen needs a little upgrade as there is limited food items available. There is no hostel facility in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Best college to increase your knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is not that huge to roam around, but satisfactory to all of our students. We got a lawn, canteen, tuck shop and the parking area other than the study area. The classrooms are well-maintained, and fully air-conditioned as well as the auditorium and the conference room. The library got all the necessary books and stuff to get much knowledge. We got 3 huge computer labs so that, the entire college students can fit in it. We got sports room with almost every equipment available in...

reviews.review_heading: Good college. Overall, satisfied with the environment here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good. The computer labs are very well-maintained with good quality Dell computers and i3 processors which have a really good performance. You can access Wi-Fi from anywhere in the college and the Wi-Fi is really Good. Several Wi-Fi routers are available so that to reduce traffic on a single Wi-Fi. The library is also very good which provides books from even foreign authors like Galvin, Shakespeare etc. Also, you can find books related to your Subjects in particular c...

The college lacked the professionalism a good management college should have. There was hardly give importance to extra-curricular. Only the toppers really existed as they would bring laurels to college name. There was hardly any campus life, there were just one building and no place to hang out. The college lacked the professionalism a good management college should have. There was hardly give importance to extra-curricular. Only the toppers really existed as they would bring laurels to college name. There was hardly any campus life, there were just one building and no place to hang out.

reviews.review_heading: The better explanation abput the college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good and it have so many space for playing roaming and free lecture timepass and have good type of canteen food and so many good garden that will provide fresh air and will not get bored of the infrastructure and hostels are good.

reviews.review_heading: Professors were great.
reviews.review_text: There are no hostels; only very small buildings with fewer people. They need to definitely improve their infrastructure. There is no ground on which students can go, only one canteen is there, and the classrooms were good. The library has limited space and it cannot handle it.

reviews.review_heading: High rated college for study.
reviews.review_text: College gives good facilities but they can't give Wi-Fi facility, they have good labs and classroom, also have very good library and medical facility to their students. But they don't have outdoor activities for their students only indoor games are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Guru Nanak Institute of Management and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The college provides minimal facilities, such as a computer lab and a hardware lab. There is a medical room inside the campus. There is no Wi-Fi for students. Classrooms are clean and nice. There is no hostel in this institution, and it is mainly local here. There is a canteen. The food served is decent, not good, and not bad.

faqs.answer: Hoshiarpur Institute of Management and Technology has courses such as BCA, BBA, MBA/PGDM to offer. These courses are in the stream of IT & Software, Business & Management Studies.
faqs.question: Q: Which courses does Hoshiarpur Institute of Management and Technology offer to students?

faqs.answer: Hoshiarpur Institute of Management and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityBCACandidates who have passed 10+2 and also have Diploma in any trade from Punjab State Board of Technical Education and Industrial Training, Chandigarh or such examination from any other recognised State Board of Technical Education, or Sant Longowal Institute of Engineering and Technology, Longowal are eligible to apply.BBACandidates must have passed the 10+2 or its equivalent examination in any stream conducted by a recognised Board/ University/ Council. OR Candidates who have passed their Matriculation examination and have also passed three year Diploma in any Trade from Punjab State Board of Technical Education & Industrial Training, Chandigarh or such Examination from any other recognised State Board of Technical Education, or Sant Longowal Institute of Engineering & Technology, Longowal are also eligible.MBA/PGDMCandidates must have passed Bachelors Degree of minimum three year duration in any disciplineand must have obtained above mentioned marks (45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserve category) from the University recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC). In case seats haven't been filled under respective categories, admission shall be considered on the basis of Inter-se-merit in the qualifying examination.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get into Hoshiarpur Institute of Management and Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?

faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by Hoshiarpur Institute of Management and Technology is up to 390. Good thing to know is that Hoshiarpur Institute of Management and Technology has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider UFly International, New Dehli as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: UFly International, New Dehli is a renowned institution offering MBA/PGDM, Certificate, UG Diploma, BBA. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Aviation. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. UFly International, New Dehli boasts an impressive review rating of 3.4 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 4 for Campus Life, 4 for Placements, 4 for Faculty, and 3 for Infrastructure.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered in Airline was 8 LPA, and the average salary package offered was 6 LPA. The college invites good companies for placements. Almost 100% of students from our course got an internship. The placement ratio is very good here.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a very good infrastructure. Labs and classrooms are in very good condition. The library has a variety of books that are not easily available in the market. The canteen and medical facilities are good enough. The college organises sports and games competitions every year.

answer.text: KMM Institute Of Technology And Science has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMCACandidate must have passed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with Mathematics as one of the subject at Intermediate or Degree level with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.After 10th DiplomaCandidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects. Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply. There is no age restriction.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.

approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.

reviews.review_heading: Review of KMM Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the hostels are not very good. Hostels are average in our college, and the food is also not good. Coming to the classes, they are good and the studies are very good. And the infrastructure is not good in our college. Our college campus is very small. Not a good environment is available in our college library. The quality of the food is very bad in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of KMM Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not very good in our college, but the facilities are good. In our classes and labs, Wi-Fi is available everywhere in the college house. Coming to the classrooms, they are very good, neat, and equipped with blackboards and digital boards. The library is also very good in our college, and all the books are available in our library.

reviews.review_heading: Review of KMM institute of technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the environment is very good and gives us fresh air. The infrastructure and the facilities available in our college are very good. We have good classrooms, and digital boards are available in classrooms. Our library is very good, and all the books are available in our library. Coming to the hostel, the food is very good, and so many variety items are on our menu. We have a canteen in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of our KMM Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: In my department, the available facilities are like Wi-Fi, machine labs, a lot of labs, EDE lab, power system lab, and electrical vehicle labs. In my hostel, the food is very good. The maintenance is superb in our college, and the mess cleaning is excellent. Sports and the doctor facilities are available in our college. The machines are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of KMM Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and resources are very good in our college. The classrooms are very good, and the Wi-Fi is very good.  The hostels are of good quality. The mess and canteen are also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of KMM Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are good. We have hostel facilities, but this year, many new students joined, and the hostel is not available for all, so private PG accommodations are arranged. The classrooms are very good, and labs are well-equipped with all necessary resources.

reviews.review_heading: My college and my experience.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in our college are Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, canteen, CAD lab, and bookshop. The facilities available in our hostel are Wi-Fi, washing machine, CCTV, food, and TV. The food in canteen is nice with reasonable price and quality. The medical facilities are also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is good in some aspects but I am only satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good. The college is surrounded by many trees and there is no disturbance in classes. We experience a peaceful environment. The hostel facility provided by the college is the worst. There are no basic facilities, especially for girls. The food is average.

reviews.review_heading: The college will improve I think.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not bad, especially in my batch we are facing a problem with having no facility for one subject. Overall, infrastructure is good, and college management is trying to improve. It gets affiliated as autonomous. If it gets autonomous then I prefer to join here.

reviews.review_heading: Kmmits is best for growth
reviews.review_text: Good labs and well-constructed classrooms are available. All the teachers are qualified. Tasty food in the mess is there. Sports are conducted every weekend. There is no access to Wi-Fi for students. The classrooms have good furniture and a clean environment. Medical facilities were okay

reviews.review_heading: KMM Institute of Technology and Science is one of the engineering colleges.
reviews.review_text: The college has basic facilities like benches, tables, chairs, and boards. However, friendships in the hostel can be lacking. The faculty members are mostly experienced, providing good teaching and friendly lectures. The classrooms and labs are satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: My engineering experience .
reviews.review_text: Faculty were very good at interacting with students and they provided help if they could. The infrastructure of our college is not so great but it was covered all sides with greenery, which feels so good. And coming to hostels, there is a girls hostel inside the college but for the boys, they have to stay near the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with joining here.
reviews.review_text:
Good labs and well-constructed classrooms are available.
All the teachers are qualified. Tasty food in the mess is there. Sports are conducted every weekend. There is no access to Wi-Fi for students. The classrooms have good furniture and a clean environment. Medical facilities were okay.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because the faculty is very friendly with the students and there are also providing good.
reviews.review_text: Our labs and classrooms are perfect and the food in the canteen is also very good and the hostel facility is only for the ladies. For the boys you have to stay in the PG hostel which is also near to the college and fees are also minimum when compare to the other hostels.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for poor students who cannot afford many expenses in college.
reviews.review_text: The college is good and has a low infrastructure. There is no Wi-Fi. There are few books in the library. The quality is also not good. It is mainly situated for middle-class people, and the management is not bad. There are no celebrations for many events. Games are not played in college. There is not much enjoyment in this college. There are no projectors in classrooms. Digital classes are not available.

overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

reviews.review_heading: Life worst decision to go in event
reviews.review_text: There is a sports ground wifi labs but not digital classrooms also the wall of college is not good in sports section there is favorite students wo got opportunity not all treated same way there is no hostel available you have to rent room by you're own

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members, decent infrastructure, and helpful environment.
reviews.review_text: College has good classrooms, labs with proper equipment, and Wi-Fi throughout the campus. Library is useful and has enough study material. It has decent infrastructure and helpful environment. It provides great learning atmosphere with supportive teachers and decent facilities. Overall, a good college with nice infrastructure and cooperative staff. It has decent labs, helpful teachers, and a good place to grow. College has good classrooms, labs with proper equipment, and Wi-Fi throughout the cam...

reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good as compared to look wise. Our college is excellent compared to other colleges. Facilities are very good in our computer science branch. All labs are available. The library is fully furnished. 24-hour water facility is available. Our college does not provide a hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, very good college. It provides placement and very good knowledge to develop our skills.
reviews.review_text: All the time, water is available as per the climate. The infrastructure is well and good, each and every department is placed on different floors. Classrooms are good, approximately 70 students sit in one class, and every bench takes 2 students. The library is very good, fully furnished, and all books related to every course are available. Our college does not have a hostel, one is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely amazing quality of academics because of the faculty. The campus is also vast and clean.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is pretty decent. It is expanded into a very large area. It consists of 4 college buildings. We have three canteens and gardens. We have one lawn. We have a library and labs in each college building. The campus is clean. The management focuses on hygiene very carefully.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, my college is the best in Bhopal because of the best facilities and placements.
reviews.review_text: My course has a lot of facilities like classrooms, labs, computer classes, Wi-Fi, placement training, etc. I am not living in a hostel, but I asked my friends who are living in a hostel. I heard from them that there are very good facilities, good quality food, and many more facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Information about the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good, and it has numerous computer labs. However, the internet connectivity in the labs is sometimes spooky and Wi-Fi doesn't always work. The library is a good place for self-study and has a large variety of books.

reviews.review_heading: Placement ratio is really good. Fee is affordable. Good study in Bansal.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Bansal's faculty is good, and the infrastructure is amazing. This course provides B.Tech, MBA, M.Tech, and B.Pharm. The classroom has 90 students, and the library is good. Labs are conducted regularly, and the food quality in the hostels is sometimes a bit lacking. The medical facility is a little bit inadequate. The sports and games facilities in Bansal College are good because they participate at the state and district levels.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bansal Institute of Research and Technology, Bansal Group of Institutes.
reviews.review_text: In my course, the department provides various facilities like smart classrooms with Wi-Fi connections, computer systems, and projectors, etc. My college does not provide any kind of hostel, but it does offer canteen, medical, and sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bansal college of research and technology.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi for students; you will only get Ethernet for college computers. The infrastructure is not that good; classrooms are well-painted, but outdoor buildings are not (they are painting it now), and there were no projectors in computer labs. Bathrooms were not good (they are working now to make it better).

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides a bright future for students.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are provided in our college. The infrastructure of our college is far superior. It provides a good Wi-Fi network that covers the entire campus. Library has plenty of books and journals. Classrooms are big. The quality of food served in the canteen is very good. Medical facilities are provided 24 hours.

reviews.review_heading: The Bansal Group will make you in industry ready and provide good quality knowledge.
reviews.review_text: That college's infrastructure and amenities are far too sophisticated and well-planned. There are several amenities offered in that college, like Wi-Fi in the library, high-quality labs, spacious classrooms, and a library with plenty of books. The mess at the canteen is of such high quality. There are additional medical facilities provided.

reviews.review_heading: The college is so good and TPO cell will help you to get placed in a good company .
reviews.review_text: In BGI campus there is a lot of facilities are available and infrastructure is also good that are available for computer Science department like Wi-Fi in every floor and Labs with good quality of computers and huge library with enough book and journals. The quality of mess in canteen is acceptable and good.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good so please get admission in my college.
reviews.review_text: There are four buildings and very high infrastructure which is very good. There is Wi-Fi and three libraries are available and classrooms are like theatre classes. Laundry man comes every Sunday in hostel. Medical dispensary is available and sports ground is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with good facilities. Our department has all facilities. The quality of the hostel available in our college is good. The hostel facilities are good. The food served in the hostel is good. They provide a variety of food items twice a day.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Apex Institute of Management and Science is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as BCA and BBA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fee structure for the Apex Institute of Management and Science programmes is around INR 1,07,500 to 1,16,296.

admission_process.title: Apex Institute of Management and Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Apex Institute of Management and Science admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Apex Institute of Management and Scienceoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include BBA, BCA, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 1,07,500. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

courses_data.name: Apex Institute of Management and Science BCA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Apex Institute of Management and Science BCAis offered to candidates at the UG level. Candidates are required to participate in the entrance-based admission process to be considered for the final admission offer. Candidates are shortlisted for the BCA programme based on their performance in the entrance exam. Candidates who qualify in the admission process are eligible to secure their seat in the 3 years programme.

Admission to this course is offered based on a valid score in MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT, ATMA, and PIM-MAT. To complete the Apex Institute of Management and Science admission process for the 2025 batch, selected candidates must pay the applicable course fee ofINR 1,16,296.

The registration deadline for AP EAPCET 2026 (without a late fee) has been extended to Mar 17, 2026, for Chaitanya Bharathi Institute of Technology, Kadapa admission to BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    Chaitanya Bharathi Institute of Technology, Kadapa provides programmes including After 10th Diploma, B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Power Engineering.

review_summary.college_name: Chaitanya Bharathi Institute of Technology, Kadapa Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, I am totally satisfied with the college and faculty.

content.Placements: Around 40% of students got placed in the ECE course, the highest package offered is above 10 LPA, the average package ranged between 4 to 5 LPA, and the lowest package is between 2.5 to 3.5 LPA, top recruiting companies included Accenture, Cognizant, DXC, LTI Mindtree, Capgemini, HCL, Infosys, Zoho, Genpact, and many other MNCs. Approximately 40 to 60% of the students secured internships depending on their academic performance. Some of the top roles offered are network engineer, vlsi design engineer, embedded systems engineer, telecommunication engineer, product manager, and system application engineer.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college, overall it's a worth, joining in this college.

content.Placements: Around 50% to 60% of students got placed from this course. The highest package is around 15 LPA, the lowest package is 4 LPA, and the average package is 6 LPA. Companies like Open Text, L&T, LTI Mindtree, Accenture, Capgemini, Cognizant, and many other MNCs, and some start-ups. Around 40% to 50% of students got offered internships from the ECE department. IoT, VLSI design engineer, embedded systems engineer, network engineer, IoT engineer, hardware design engineer, RF engineer, and signal processing engineer are the roles offered.
