reviews.review_heading: Overall, I am totally satisfied with the college and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college has spacious classrooms with all the necessary facilities, the labs are equipped with Ethernet and Wi-Fi connectivity. The library is well-resourced and contains a wide variety of books that are sufficient for our course requirements. There is also a large ground where cultural and technical events are organized. Hostel facilities are available for non-local students, and the food provided is good. In case of any needs, canteen facilities are available as well. Medical services are a...

reviews.review_heading: Good college, overall it's a worth, joining in this college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are equipped with Wi-Fi facilities, green boards, projectors, etc. Separate, well-equipped labs for various subjects like Physics, Chemistry, Electrical Engineering, and more, with modern equipment and licensed and all kinds of hardware and electrical equipment for practical and research work. There is a good resource library with all kinds of books available. Hostel food is average. A canteen is available in the college as well as the hostel. A 24/7 medical facility is available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a good college.
reviews.review_text: It's just decent infrastructure. We can't say they provide excellent infrastructure, etc., but it's okay. CBIT Proddatur has achieved impressive placement statistics with over 432 placements in the current year and strong industry connections. Good?

reviews.review_heading: My opinion is very good about Chaitanya Bharathi Institute.
reviews.review_text: The college is full of green infrastructure and big buildings. There are many computer labs and electrical labs and every one can do experiments with the equipment provided. Excellent food menu at reasonable prices for everyone is available. Wi-Fi facility is good.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with college premises and education.
reviews.review_text: Food quality is very good. Canteen is very good. Hostel is good with good beds and cots. Medical facilities are provided and emergency kits are available in every staff room. Sports and games are conducted every week.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college with good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good with good equipment and updated systems for CSE students. Labs are well-established under the guidelines of AICTE. Wi-Fi facility, purified drinking water, and hygienic food are provided in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with placements and huge campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are good. Labs, classrooms, a library, and Wi-Fi are good and clean. The quality of food and hostel facilities are very good. Food served in the mess and canteen is healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a beautiful environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not that good. There are extra facilities. The food is not good. They need to provide more facilities. Medical facilities are also not good. Sports and games are good. The management should develop a good environment and should provide good food.

reviews.review_heading: The teachers are very helpful.
reviews.review_text:
We have good facilities and good hostel for studies. The quality of food available in the mess & canteen is good.
Medical facilities, sports play ground also available in my college we have also good labs, classrooms and library also we have all facilities in my college .

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college, and I think you can choose this college.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. It has good practical labs. Good internet facilities are available. There are separate hostel facilities for girls and boys. The hostel food is not bad. In my opinion, this college is very good.

reviews.review_heading: In this college, faculty members are not up to level, and need improvement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good. Great collection of books in the library. Neat and well-maintained, and the playground was available. Good bus facilities were provided. Well-built roads and buildings. It had a good restroom and drinking water facilities. Wi-Fi speed was not good. This college was average.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the faculty and good placements in 2021.
reviews.review_text: The food and the hostel facility are good. The medical dispensary is also available here. Sports are encouraged by the PT faculty members. Labs are good here. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Purified mineral drinking water is available on the campus. Sports hour is given once a week. The canteen is always available for students who like fast food.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for the students who choose the electrical and electronics engineering course.
reviews.review_text: Mobile phones are not allowed on college premises. It has a good library and good infrastructure. I would rate 3 out of 5 for the quality of food served to the students. The hostel facility is not as much as expected. It trains students for better sports and games. It provides the best sports equipment.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for B.Tech and diploma. CBIT has a great principal named Srinivasula Reddy.
reviews.review_text: There are good lab facilities here. Our college doesn't have medical facilities, and the quality of food served in the canteen is average. Wi-Fi facility is available here, but they don't share Wi-Fi password. There is a good ground for cricket and basketball. Indoor games like table tennis, etc., are also provided in the sports room. Mobile phones are not allowed on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: It provided good placements from 2019 to 2021.
reviews.review_text: It provides good hostel and mess facilities. Our college has a good infrastructure and facilities. The college is surrounded by greenery. The college bus facility is also available in and around 25 kilometers for transport. It is the best college in Kadapa. Every year our college conducts sports and games on college premises. Our college provides well-furnished labs, a Wi-Fi, water facility, clean premises, a well-equipped library, and computer labs.
